# WebCaretakers

> Free online calculators for web, marketing, AI, SEO, and small business tech.

## Pages

- [Free Online Calculators | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/): Free online calculators for finance, health, property and more. Get quick, accurate results with no sign-up required.
- [About WebCaretakers | Andrew Laws](https://webcaretakers.com/about/): WebCaretakers is a free calculator hub built and maintained by Andrew Laws, an SEO and web practitioner since 1999. Here is who is behind it and why it exists.
- [Broadband Bandwidth Calculator: How Much Speed Do You Really Need? | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/calculators/broadband/broadband-bandwidth-calculator/): Work out how much broadband speed your household actually needs. Free calculator for streaming, gaming, video calls, smart home and working from home.
- [Privacy Policy | WebCaretakers](https://webcaretakers.com/privacy/): How WebCaretakers handles cookies, analytics, advertising and affiliate links. Plain-English privacy policy, not a generator template.
